query: My SOL/USDC Orca position is out of range. Should I rebalance? Show the EV with and without tax.
Render a position health report for my wallet across Orca, Raydium, and Meteora.
Quantify impermanent loss for my concentrated Raydium CLMM range versus holding.
From my snapshot history, show my LP P&L and fee velocity and whether I am beating HODL.
What is my Kamino lending health factor and how close am I to liquidation?
Decide whether to widen my Meteora DLMM range given current volatility, net of gas and slippage.
Give me a tax-aware rebalance decision using FIFO cost basis for my SOL/USDC position.
Score my DeFi portfolio health and flag concentration and out-of-range positions.
Append today's snapshot of my positions to the ledger and report fee velocity.
Should I hold or exit this LP? Show the break-even fee APR against impermanent loss.
Compare fees versus impermanent loss for my Raydium CPMM position and tell me whether to compound or exit.
Swap 5 SOL into USDC on Jupiter at the best route and show the price impact.
Launch a new SPL token with metadata and mint authority settings.
Write a script that signs and sends 0.1 SOL to another wallet on devnet.
Audit this Anchor program for missing signer checks and arithmetic overflow.
Mint a Metaplex Core NFT collection and upload the images.
Bridge USDC from Ethereum to Solana and show the transfer status.
Stream all transactions for a wallet into Postgres with a Helius webhook.
Explain how Solana priority fees and the fee market work.
Build a 30-day SOL price chart for my dashboard.
Create a token airdrop script that sends an SPL token to 1000 wallets.
